{{tfd|Section}}{{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[la:Formula:Section]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

"{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" can be replaced with "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display".''' ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

{{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} carries a performance penalty compared to {{tl|Section}}, so {{tl|Section}} is preferable when there are many tags in an article. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

revision.comment: I think the reason for the penalty is the handling of potentially many anchor names
revision.text: {{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} accepts multiple anchor names and this carries a performance penalty, so {{tlf|Section}} is preferable when a page would use the template in many places. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

{{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} accepts multiple anchor names and this carries a performance penalty, so {{tlf|Section}} may be preferable if server performance is more important than reducing the number of templates new users have to learn. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

{{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} carries a performance penalty compared to {{tl|Section}}, so {{tl|Section}} is preferable when there are many tags in an article. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

revision.comment: I think the reason for the penalty is the handling of potentially many anchor names
revision.text: {{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} accepts multiple anchor names and this carries a performance penalty, so {{tlf|Section}} is preferable when a page would use the template in many places. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

{{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} accepts multiple anchor names and this carries a performance penalty, so {{tlf|Section}} may be preferable if server performance is more important than reducing the number of templates new users have to learn. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

However, {{tl|Anchor}} accepts multiple anchor names and this carries a performance penalty, so {{tlf|Section}} may be preferable if server performance is more important than reducing the number of templates new users have to learn. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

{{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} carries a performance penalty compared to {{tl|Section}}, so {{tl|Section}} is preferable when there are many tags in an article. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

revision.text: {{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} accepts multiple anchor names and this carries a performance penalty, so {{tlf|Section}} is preferable when a page would use the template in many places. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

{{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} carries a performance penalty compared to {{tl|Section}}, so {{tl|Section}} is preferable when there are many tags in an article. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

revision.comment: I think the reason for the penalty is the handling of potentially many anchor names
revision.text: {{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} accepts multiple anchor names and this carries a performance penalty, so {{tlf|Section}} is preferable when a page would use the template in many places. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

{{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} accepts multiple anchor names and this carries a performance penalty, so {{tlf|Section}} may be preferable if server performance is more important than reducing the number of templates new users have to learn. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

"{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" can be replaced with "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display".''' ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

{{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} carries a performance penalty compared to {{tl|Section}}, so {{tl|Section}} is preferable when there are many tags in an article. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

revision.comment: I think the reason for the penalty is the handling of potentially many anchor names
revision.text: {{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} accepts multiple anchor names and this carries a performance penalty, so {{tlf|Section}} is preferable when a page would use the template in many places. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]

{{{2|}}} {{documentation|content= ==Functonality== Creates an [[HTML element#Anchor|HTML anchor]]. This template is largely equivalent to the more widely used {{tl|Anchor}} template when used for a single tag. That is, "{{Section|id123|Text to display}}" is equivalent to "{{Anchor|id123}}Text to display". However, {{tl|Anchor}} accepts multiple anchor names and this carries a performance penalty, so {{tlf|Section}} may be preferable if server performance is more important than reducing the number of templates new users have to learn. ==Usage== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} * '''parameter1''' — ''required'' *: This indicates the name of the HTML anchor * '''parameter2''' — ''optional'' *: This creates text to display at the location of the template In order to access this link anchor, use [[examplepagename#parameter1]] ==Example== {{tlx|section|parameter1|parameter2}} {{section|parameter1|parameter2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Anchor}} }} [[Category:Wikipedia formatting and function templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[es:Plantilla:Sección]] [[vi:Bản mẫu:Section]]
